args.query:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(op.OwnerId),'#','') AS OwnerId,
       AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(op.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity op
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(TRIM(op.ContractID__c),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE CAST(op.CreatedDate AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(op.OwnerId),'#','') AS OwnerId,
       AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(op.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity op
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(TRIM(op.ContractID__c),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE CAST(op.CreatedDate AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
